title: MrSwords & Tools 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)
description: Enhances Minecraft’s weapons and tools with detailed 3D models and luminous effects that glow in the dark.
body:
![donations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec3d8a5316b0b542a54ce2fe11aeebf8862eed7.png)
[A donation makes my time worthwhile; please consider supporting me if you like this content.](https://paypal.me/MrTuGaaGames)

**MrSwords & Tools 3D Glowing (OptiFine/Continuity)**
![MrSwords & Tools 3D Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/894d652f2c8631df539b1d26da1889facf15be0f_0.webp)
A premium resource pack that enhances Minecraft’s swords, pickaxes, axes, shovels, and hoes with custom 3D models and glowing effects designed specifically for users with OptiFine or Continuity installed. This version takes full advantage of emissive mapping and shader-friendly textures, offering deeper visual immersion in low-light environments.

Built for players who seek maximum visual fidelity, this pack complements **[MrOres 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-glowing-(optifinecontinuity))** or **[MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-vanilla-glowing)** for a unified glowing experience across tools and ores.
![MrSwords & Tools 3D Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69a14f6776a48c98fb970c6c83564e6a86289ca_0.webp)
🔧 Key Features:

- High-detail 3D models for all major tools and weapons

- Advanced glowing textures using emissive mapping

- Fully compatible with **OptiFine** and **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**

- Shader-friendly design for enhanced depth and realism

📸 Recommendations:

- Ideal for survival, adventure, or creative worlds with shaders enabled

- Combine with **[MrOres 3D Glowing (Optifine/Continuity)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-glowing-(optifinecontinuity))** or **[MrOres 3D Vanilla Glowing](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mrores-3d-vanilla-glowing)** for a cohesive glowing aesthetic

- Ensure emissive textures are enabled in OptiFine settings for full effect
![MrSwords & Tools 3D Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5061129a9dca6237343e4832a585dc576ba3536e_0.webp)
